title: n8n not processing webhooks in production mode
symptom: The webhook works in test mode but does not trigger any actions in production. The logs indicate that n8n is not processing the incoming requests.
not_this_if: n8n is not running in Docker
root_cause: The issue arises when certain environment variables are set in the docker-compose.yml file, specifically disabling the main process for production. This prevents n8n from handling incoming webhook requests properly.
fix_steps: Open the docker-compose.yml file for your n8n setup.
Remove the lines setting N8N_DISABLE_PRODUCTION_MAIN_PROCESS=true and N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED=true.
Restart the n8n service using docker-compose up -d.
agent_instruction: Remove the conflicting environment variables from the docker-compose.yml and restart n8n.
